headlines.title: Seahawks Select Notre Dame RB Jadarian Price in First Round of 2026 NFL Draft
headlines.summary: The Seattle Seahawks selected Notre Dame running back Jadarian Price with the 32nd overall pick in the first round of the 2026 NFL Draft. This marks the first time Seattle has taken a running back in the first round since Rashaad Penny in 2018.

headlines.title: Washington DNR to Close Multiple Campgrounds Due to $8M Budget Shortfall
headlines.summary: Washington's Department of Natural Resources announced it will shut down four campgrounds for the entire 2026 season and shorten access at several more due to budget constraints. Winston Creek Campground will have a reduced season, opening June 1 and closing October 1.

headlines.title: Alarming Gray Whale Deaths Reported Along Washington and Oregon Coasts
headlines.summary: Marine biologists are concerned about an uptick in gray whale deaths along the Pacific Northwest coast. Multiple whales have been found dead off Vancouver Island and Washington state during their northward migration from Mexico. Researchers believe a decline in available prey may be to blame.

headlines.title: Tacoma Narrows Bridge Westbound Lanes Closed Due to Structural Deterioration
headlines.summary: Two right westbound lanes of the Tacoma Narrows Bridge are closed indefinitely after inspectors discovered structural deterioration on a bridge joint support. WSDOT has opened the HOV lane to all traffic, but significant delays are expected for SR 16 travelers.

headlines.title: Seattle U Redhawks Face Pepperdine in First-Ever Baseball Series
headlines.summary: The Seattle University Redhawks baseball team is set to open a three-game West Coast Conference series against Pepperdine on Friday, April 24, 2026, marking the first-ever meeting between the two programs on the baseball diamond.

headlines.title: Weekend Events: Free Shredding in West Seattle and Apple Blossom Festival
headlines.summary: This weekend offers several community events including a free shredding event at High Point Library on Sunday (10 am - 1 pm), the Apple Blossom Festival, and various activities around the region as spring weather returns.

top_story.title: Seahawks Select Notre Dame RB Jadarian Price in First Round of 2026 NFL Draft
top_story.summary: The Seattle Seahawks made a splash in the 2026 NFL Draft by selecting Notre Dame running back Jadarian Price with the 32nd overall pick. This is Seattle's first first-round running back selection since 2018, signaling a potential shift in their offensive strategy. Price is expected to bolster the team's ground game alongside quarterback Geno Smith.
